task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenCAD login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the OpenCAD login screen at http://localhost.

task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenCAD system
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the OpenCAD dashboard or home screen, indicating the admin user has successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Departments management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD interface showing a 'Departments' management page or a list of current departments.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new department
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, page, or form specifically for creating or adding a new department is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the required department name and abbreviation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Mine Safety Division' is typed into the department name field, and 'MSD' is typed into the abbreviation or short name field.

task_completion.description: Successfully save and add the new department
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the department was created, OR 'Mine Safety Division' with abbreviation 'MSD' is visible as a new entry in the departments list/table.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenCAD web interface, rather than terminal windows using curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are entered into the genuine OpenCAD web forms, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, adminer, or command-line SQL clients) being used to insert the department directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected department name is exactly 'Mine Safety Division'. The expected abbreviation/short name is exactly 'MSD'.
